scripts.copy:quill: npx shx mkdir -p wwwroot/lib/quill && npx shx cp node_modules/quill/dist/quill.js wwwroot/lib/quill/ && npx shx cp node_modules/quill/dist/quill.snow.css wwwroot/lib/quill/
scripts.copy:bootstrap-icons: npx shx mkdir -p wwwroot/lib/bootstrap-icons && npx shx cp -r node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font wwwroot/lib/bootstrap-icons/
scripts.build: npm run copy:quill && npm run copy:bootstrap-icons && npm run build:web
